fato_historico: 2024: A Saurya Airlines Bombardier CRJ200 crashes during takeoff from Tribhuvan International Airport in Kathmandu, Nepal killing 18.
energia_do_dia: Today, you may feel an extra layer of resilience as you navigate your professional path. Much like the steady wings that rise above the clouds, consider how you can soar past obstacles with grace. It is a good time to reflect on the fragility of life and prioritize the connections that truly ground your ambitious spirit.
frase_do_dia: Even the highest peaks are reached one careful step at a time.
significado_numero: Represents the path of inner intuition and navigating through unseen challenges.
conselho: Value your journey today and offer extra kindness to those around you.
